programs.title: Beetlejuice
programs.desc: After Barbara and Adam Maitland die in a car accident, they find themselves stuck haunting their country residence, unable to leave the house. When the unbearable Deetzes and teen daughter Lydia buy the home, the Maitlands attempt to scare them away without success. Their efforts attract Beetlejuice, a rambunctious spirit whose help quickly becomes dangerous for the Maitlands and innocent Lydia.

programs.title: The Lion King
programs.desc: Simba idolizes his father, King Mufasa, and takes to heart his own royal destiny on the plains of Africa. But not everyone in the kingdom celebrates the new cub's arrival. Scar, Mufasa's brother -- and former heir to the throne -- has plans of his own. The battle for Pride Rock is soon ravaged with betrayal, tragedy and drama, ultimately resulting in Simba's exile. Now, with help from a curious pair of newfound friends, Simba must figure out how to grow up and take back what is rightfully his.

programs.title: Jungle Cruise
programs.desc: Dr. Lily Houghton enlists the aid of wisecracking skipper Frank Wolff to take her down the Amazon in his ramshackle boat. Together, they search for an ancient tree that holds the power to heal -- a discovery that will change the future of medicine.

programs.title: The 700 Club
programs.desc: Inspiring stories of miracles and answered prayers from around the world.

programs.title: According to Jim
programs.desc: Jim turns baby-sitting into a sporting event by staging baby races where the fathers bet on their kids.

programs.title: According to Jim
programs.desc: Despite Mandy's warnings, Andy plays snow football with Jim and gets injured.
